title: Bloomberg extends financial data to $25B tokenized markets via Kaiko
message_html: Bloomberg extends financial data to $25B tokenized markets via Kaiko ...
snippet: Bloomberg and Kaiko aim to embed licensed financial data directly on blockchain networks, targeting institutional tokenized Treasurys and repo markets.

title: US regulator scrutinised over bank licence sought by Trump crypto venture
message_html: US regulator scrutinised over bank licence sought by Trump crypto venture ...
snippet: UAE investment in World Liberty Financial has intensified concerns about favourable treatment and national security
